title: After the Hanshin J.F.: Behind the Pillar

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gossip concerning Sweep Tosho's bratty behavior
spreads among the racecourse staff, who worry
that she won't show up for the winning concert.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I tell them she'll be fine. Hearing that, Sweep
Tosho shows up to the concert on time and
performs spectacularly.
